# Issue #8754: Enhance/metatensor extraction
**Repository:** Project-MONAI/MONAI
**Author:** skdas20
**Status:** open
**Created At:** 2026-02-22T19:38:54Z

## Description
Enhanced [ExtractDataKeyFromMetaKeyd] with [image_only] parameter
Properly handles MetaTensor metadata without duplication

## Comments
### Comment by coderabbitai[bot] at 2026-02-22T19:39:15Z
<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: summarize by coderabbit.ai -->
<!-- walkthrough_start -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## monai/apps/reconstruction/transforms/dictionary.py

### Walkthrough

Adds an `image_only: bool = False` parameter to `ExtractDataKeyFromMetaKeyd`. When `image_only` is True, the transform skips extracting the meta value if that value is a MetaTensor, preventing duplication of metadata associations. Existing missing-key handling remains unchanged and docstring updated.

### Estimated code review effort

🎯 2 (Simple) | ⏱️ ~10 minutes

---

## monai/handlers/tensorboard_handlers.py

### Walkthrough

When no `summary_writer` is provided, `TensorBoardHandler` now checks for the presence of `SummaryWriter` and raises a `RuntimeError` with installation instructions if tensorboard is not available; otherwise it initializes a default writer as before.

### Estimated code review effort

🎯 2 (Simple) | ⏱️ ~7 minutes

---

## monai/transforms/croppad/functional.py

### Walkthrough

Simplifies `pad_nd` by removing dtype-based exclusion from the condition that selects PyTorch padding. PyTorch padding is now chosen solely based on the padding `mode` set, with the existing fallback to NumPy padding unchanged.

### Estimated code review effort

🎯 2 (Simple) | ⏱️ ~10 minutes

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
